name: @primeinc/claude-hooks
description: Deterministic frustration detection, AST-based bash command guards, and docs-before-code enforcement for Claude Code
author: primeinc

scripts.test: node bash-guards/scripts/test-guards.js && node frustration-detector/scripts/test-frustration.js && node docs-guard/tests/test-extract.js && node docs-guard/tests/test-pipeline.js && node docs-guard/tests/test-real-ids.js && node docs-guard/tests/test-failure-modes.js
